Crypto Rug Muncher
Looking for a community raid leader.

What you’ll do:

• Spot high-quality posts where a thoughtful reply and mention of our project adds value.
• Coordinate light, smart raids (no spam, no bans).
• Keep the team organized and on-message.

What we’re looking for:

• Nonpaid, voluntary role. Ideally a larger holder and community member who’s motivated by the mission.
• Sharp eye for relevance and timing.
• Experience with community promotion or modding is a plus.

If interested, DM @CryptoRugMunch on X or Telegram. Tell me why you want the role and your background. Let’s amplify the right conversations for $CRM and $cryptorugmunch.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Update on holder distribution: the former largest holder of $CRM dumped for $WLFI today. They were holding over 2% of the supply and are now out. The new largest holder controls 1.87%. Overall, I see this as a positive—an early whale exit can mean healthier redistribution, a more organic and fair supply, and less selling pressure hanging over the market. We’re focused on building and broadening ownership. Buy and hold with confidence. Onward for $CRM and $cryptorugmunch! 🚀

02:38
Crypto Rug Muncher
Some of you have asked for more details on my vision for the utility of the token and here are some things I have committed to so far mentally. Feel free to add any suggestions you have so that I may consider them as well.

Update on $CRM / $cryptorugmunch Utility

What we’re building
📱 Apps + Bot: Mobile app, web app, and a Telegram bot.
🔍 Threat labels: Flag basic security risks with side‑by‑side breakdowns from top crypto security tools.
🕸 Deeper wallet forensics: Map connections between wallets within a project, beyond surface‑level heuristics currently offered.
🧩 Scam linkage: Tie wallets to past scams/rug pulls where evidence supports it.
🆕 Fresh wallet focus: Highlights and tracks “fresh” wallets entering a project.
🤖 AI assistant: An agent on X, Telegram, and in‑app to help analyze tokens and explain findings to the community.
📈 Social Sentiment Radar: Track mentions on X, classify positive/neutral/negative, visualize trends, and alert on spikes, bot swarms, FUD waves, or organic momentum.

Access model
🟢 Free tier: Core scans, labels, sentiment overview, and education.
⭐️ Premium tier: Advanced forensics, deeper sentiment analytics, and real‑time alerts. Access via $CRM/$cryptorugmunch holdings or purchase with other cryptocurrencies.

Timeline
🧪 Community beta: Targeting mid–late Q4.
🚀 Public launch: Late Q4 or early Q1, pending build/testing.
📅 Note: Timelines are realistic estimates and may adjust with resourcing and community feedback.

Goal
🛡 Make crypto safer: reduce scams, improve due diligence, and equip degens with the tools and education they need.

When you were the largest $CRM holder, paper‑handed into Trump’s newest scam $WLFI, and got absolutely rekt… Lesson learned: stick with community‑backed, utility‑driven projects that reject pump‑and‑dump culture.

We’re building security tools for the community—threat labels, wallet forensics, and sentiment alerts—to make crypto safer. If you align with the mission, support $CRM / $cryptorugmunch instead of the bundlers.

DYOR. NFA.

• I’ll open with an apology for the delay and unveil the completed website live.

C
09:47
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why did I create two tokens after being adamantly against influencer coins? Because the market changed and the creator economy has finally arrived. Creators now—and going forward—will control their earnings, and the market will decide their value. I wanted to be at the front of that. Apps like @BagsApp and @zora make it easy to launch, reward real work, and help us expand on what we already do.

Can people still use these platforms to extract? Sure—and they likely will. But for those who actually want to build and have influence, these apps make it immediately possible to begin. I’m happy to be part of this paradigm shift and to use proceeds to build something bigger than myself. $CRM $cryptorugmunch
❤ 10 👍 2

13:27
Degen
If you move tokens to another address, this transfer doesn’t show up on DEXtools, and it still looks like everything is being held on the same address. It’s often confusing.
13:36

Crypto Rug Muncher
Telegram note: Our channel works a little differently.

• When you join, you’re subscribing to our main broadcast channel (announcements).

• To chat, you’ll be placed in the separate linked group: “Crypto Rug Muncher Chat.”

• That’s why we have ~8k channel subscribers but ~1.6k in the chat.

• Join the community and jump into the discussion here first and then you can chat:

https://t.me/cryptorugmuncher

23:55
Crypto Rug Muncher
I am pleased to announce that I have officially paid for and filed to form Rug Munch Media LLC in the state of Wyoming 🦬. This project also now has an official business address in the state of Wyoming for the next year. Why did I choose Wyoming? The state has favorable crypto laws on the books that make changing from an LLC to a DAO relatively painless and that is the eventual goal for this project. I'll make another announcement when we are approved as an LLC by the state!

Stick around. Big things are coming! 🚀 $CRM $cryptorugmunch

C
00:39
Crypto Rug Muncher
Here’s why I consider $CRM built to be "unruggable". I’m not a whale—just a top-40 holder—so I don’t benefit from dumping tokens on the community. My incentive comes from the trading fees the project earns when there’s healthy activity, which only happens if I keep building and the community stays engaged. If I stop delivering, activity falls and fees dry up. That alignment is intentional: the community controls most of the supply, and my best outcome comes from working for the project, not against it. While nothing is 100% “unruggable,” the setup aims to make a rug economically irrational and community accountability strong.

02:22
Crypto Rug Muncher
Remember, we’re a small upstart—the “team” right now is literally just me. If something takes a bit longer or I’m slow to reply, please keep that in mind. I’m running this as lean and efficient as possible so we can scale faster as funds allow.

I’m also a perfectionist. I’d rather delay than ship trash to the community. Please understand those two facts before getting impatient. If I’m awake, I’m working on the project.

02:49
Crypto Rug Muncher
We didn’t do the typical marketing blitz for a quick pop that fades and leaves the project dead in the water—and broke—once the noise quiets down.

Instead, I put those funds into forming the LLC because I wanted immediate accountability and a real foundation to build on. A legal entity makes us more credible with partners, exchanges, and future hires—and it compounds long-term value in a way a week of spamming the internet never could.

We’re not chasing noise; we’re building something that lasts. I’m doing things differently, and I hope the community sees that and decides to join us.

$CRM $cryptorugmunch
